source.title: Customer Satisfaction Peer Comparison: Domestic (PDD vs Taobao vs JD) and International (Temu vs Amazon vs Shein)

extractions.claim: DOMESTIC iOS App Store peer comparison (China, March 2026)
extractions.evidence: Taobao: 4.14/5 (1,679,186 ratings). Pinduoduo: 2.93/5 (3,380,562 ratings). JD: data unavailable via iTunes API. Pinduoduo has the LOWEST iOS rating among major Chinese e-commerce apps despite having the most ratings (2x Taobao). Gap: -1.21 points vs Taobao.

verification.verifier_notes: iTunes Lookup API, country=cn. Scripts: scrape-appstore.py, qimai-appdata.py

extractions.claim: INTERNATIONAL iOS App Store peer comparison (US, March 2026)
extractions.evidence: Amazon: 4.83/5 (8,344,524 ratings). Temu: 4.67/5 (2,064,730 ratings). Taobao: 3.66/5 (9,556 ratings). Pinduoduo: 2.37/5 (7,004 ratings). Temu trails Amazon by only 0.16 points on iOS. Both significantly outperform Taobao/Pinduoduo in the US market.

verification.verifier_notes: iTunes Lookup API, country=us. Scripts: scrape-appstore.py

extractions.evidence: Temu: 2.0/5 (48,750 reviews). Shein: mixed (350,000 reviews on main profile, Canada 82% 1-star). Temu's Trustpilot rating is significantly lower than its App Store rating (2.0 vs 4.67), reflecting the complaint-driven self-selection bias of Trustpilot.

verification.verifier_notes: Trustpilot scraper + WebSearch. Shein's exact TrustScore not directly available from search.

extractions.claim: DOMESTIC Heimao complaint comparison: Pinduoduo #2, improving reply rate
extractions.evidence: Monthly complaint ranking (Dec 2025): #1 Douyin, #2 Pinduoduo, #3 Taobao. Douyin's complaint volume grew fastest (+78.94% YoY in 2024). Pinduoduo reply rate: 20% (improving). Taobao: 5%. JD/Douyin: 100%.

verification.verifier_notes: Source: Heimao monthly reports via WebSearch

extractions.claim: INTERNATIONAL: Temu has 10 CPSC recalls vs Amazon's negligible rate for its own products
extractions.evidence: Temu: 10 CPSC recalls (all children's safety products). These are disproportionately high for a platform of Temu's age (~3 years). Categories: helmets, pajamas, magnets, carriers, cribs. All sold exclusively on Temu.com by third-party sellers.

extractions.claim: INTERNATIONAL: Amazon leads customer satisfaction with 64% planning increased spending
extractions.evidence: Amazon: 64% of consumers plan increased spending (highest). Temu: 28% shop monthly. Shein: 23% shop monthly. Amazon Haul: only 16% shop monthly despite 24% trying it.
